examples: Now in its fifth year, with the rapid growth of the company, Bock employs 40 people.
Hundreds of restaurants across North America pay a small sum of money to Bock for the recycling of their used chopsticks.
Bock takes pride in his work. And he hopes the idea behind ChopValue will help people rethink what they see as waste.
"What faith does in this case is fuel a sense of mission and direction, " Bock says.
Bock, however, warns against drawing conclusions about anyone's policies from his or her faith.
